title: Aptech is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Aptech is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Aptech, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
